prompt: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie of a beautiful young Japanese woman with smooth porcelain skin, soft natural facial features, large warm brown eyes, glossy pink lips, and a sleek short black bob haircut, wearing a white athletic headband. She is standing on an indoor badminton court while holding a pink-and-black badminton racket in one hand and taking a selfie with the other from a high overhead angle. She wears a black-and-white sports jersey, matching athletic shorts, and bright yellow badminton shoes, smiling softly at the camera with a relaxed, cheerful expression. The background features a realistic indoor sports hall with green badminton courts, gray flooring, court lines, and bright overhead lights. The image looks exactly like it was casually captured using a modern flagship smartphone, featuring natural indoor lighting, authentic skin texture, subtle HDR, slight front-camera wide-angle distortion, realistic sensor noise, mild handheld imperfections, balanced exposure, and soft computational photography. No DSLR look, no studio lighting, no heavy beauty filters, no artificial bokeh, and no AI-perfect sharpness—just a genuine candid mobile phone selfie with a realistic social media aesthetic.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic smartphone selfie of a beautiful young Japanese woman with smooth porcelain skin, soft natural facial features, large warm brown eyes, glossy pink lips, and a sleek short black bob haircut, wearing a white athletic headband. She is standing on an indoor badminton court while holding a pink-and-black badminton racket in one hand and taking a selfie with the other from a high overhead angle. She wears a black-and-white sports jersey, matching athletic shorts, and bright yellow badminton shoes, smiling softly at the camera with a relaxed, cheerful expression. The background features a realistic indoor sports hall with green badminton courts, gray flooring, court lines, and bright overhead lights. The image looks exactly like it was casually captured using a modern flagship smartphone, featuring natural indoor lighting, authentic skin texture, subtle HDR, slight front-camera wide-angle distortion, realistic sensor noise, mild handheld imperfections, balanced exposure, and soft computational photography. No DSLR look, no studio lighting, no heavy beauty filters, no artificial bokeh, and no AI-perfect sharpness—just a genuine candid mobile phone selfie with a realistic social media aesthetic.
promptZh: 由现代旗舰智能手机拍摄的超逼真自拍，画面中是一位美丽的年轻 日本 女性，拥有细腻的瓷肌、柔和自然的五官、温暖的大棕色眼睛、水润的粉色嘴唇，留着 利落的黑色短波波头，佩戴白色运动发带。她站在室内 羽毛球 场上，一只手拿着粉黑相间的 羽毛球 球拍，另一只手从高处俯拍自拍。她身穿黑白运动衫，搭配运动短裤和亮黄色的 羽毛球 鞋，对着镜头露出轻松愉悦的微笑。背景是真实的室内体育馆，可见绿色的 羽毛球 场地、灰色地板、球场线条以及明亮的顶灯。图像看起来就像是用现代旗舰手机随意拍摄的，具有自然的室内光线、真实的皮肤纹理、细腻的 HDR、轻微的前置摄像头广角畸变、真实的传感器噪点、轻微的手持晃动感、平衡的曝光以及柔和的计算摄影效果。没有单反相机的质感，没有影棚灯光，没有厚重的美颜滤镜，没有人工虚化，也没有 AI 生成的过度锐化——这只是一张带有真实社交媒体美感的、自然随性的手机自拍。
